title: Ores N More
description: Welcome to Ores N More, my first mod! This is sort of a test, where all my ideas and new things I learn are packed into one! The versions start from 1.20.1
body:
# Ores N More

## Description

This is my first mod! It's like a drawing board, where whenever I learn something new I will push it into this mod. After some time, I'll create a niche mod. (Hint hint dogs)

## Mod Loader
Fabric. No, I am not porting to forge.

#### Warning! The only official place to download this mod is modrinth! Other websites may contain malware, including CurseForge!

### Source
The repository can be found on [Github](https://github.com/s0ulb0lt/Ores-N-More-1.20.X)

## Changelog

- ##### - Added sapphire
- ##### - Added raw sapphire
- ##### - Added sapphire block
- ##### - Added raw sapphire block
- ##### - Added sapphire and nether sapphire ore. (Doesn't generate)
- ##### - Added ores n more creative tab
